title: Create a new artifact with all required trilingual fields and publish status
description: Verifies an admin can create a new artifact and see it listed in the artifacts table.

steps.description: Click the admin login submit button
Click the "Artifacts" tab in the sidebar
Verify text "Yeni Eser Ekle" is visible
Select an option from the "Kategori" (category) dropdown
Select an option from the "Alt Kategori" (sub category) dropdown
Fill "https://example.com/test-artifact-image.jpg" into the image URL field
Fill "E2E Test Eser TR" into the Turkish title field (Başlık TR)
Fill "E2E Test Artifact EN" into the English title field (Title EN)
Fill "E2E Δοκιμή Έργο EL" into the Greek title field (Τίτλος EL)
Fill "TR açıklama - E2E" into the Turkish description field (Açıklama TR)
Fill "EN description - E2E" into the English description field (Description EN)
Fill "EL περιγραφή - E2E" into the Greek description field (Περιγραφή EL)
Select "Yayınla" (or equivalent published/active option) from the status dropdown
Verify text "E2E Test Eser TR" is visible

title: Create artifact validation: missing image URL shows required-field error
description: Verifies required-field validation blocks saving when image URL is missing.

steps.description: Click the admin login submit button
Click the "Artifacts" tab in the sidebar
Select an option from the "Kategori" (category) dropdown
Fill "E2E Missing Image TR" into the Turkish title field (Başlık TR)

title: Create artifact validation: missing Turkish title shows required-field error
description: Verifies required-field validation blocks saving when the Turkish title is missing.

steps.description: Click the admin login submit button
Click the "Artifacts" tab in the sidebar
Select an option from the "Kategori" (category) dropdown
Fill "https://example.com/test-artifact-image-2.jpg" into the image URL field

title: Artifacts table renders expected headers and action column
description: Verifies the artifacts module shows the expected table structure and actions.

steps.description: Click the admin login submit button
Click the "Artifacts" tab in the sidebar
Verify text "Yeni Eser Ekle" is visible

title: Edit an existing artifact and verify updated title appears in list
description: Verifies an admin can edit an artifact and see the updated value reflected in the artifacts table.

steps.description: Click the admin login submit button
Click the "Artifacts" tab in the sidebar
Click the "Edit" (Düzenle) action for the first artifact in the table
Fill "E2E Updated TR Title" into the Turkish title field (Başlık TR)
Verify text "E2E Updated TR Title" is visible

title: Edit artifact validation: clearing required field shows error and prevents save
description: Verifies editing enforces required-field validation when a required field is cleared.

steps.description: Click the admin login submit button
Click the "Artifacts" tab in the sidebar
Click the "Edit" (Düzenle) action for the first artifact in the table
Fill "" into the Turkish title field (Başlık TR)

title: Create a new event with required fields (TR) and save successfully
description: Verifies an admin can create a new past event with a valid date, Turkish title, and description and then see it listed in the events table.

steps.description: Click the "Events" module in the sidebar

title: Verify events table loads and shows expected column headers
description: Verifies the Events module displays the events table and key column headers are visible.

steps.description: Click the "Events" module in the sidebar

title: Create a new event with multilingual titles (TR + EN + EL)
description: Verifies an admin can fill optional English and Greek titles along with required Turkish fields and save the event.

steps.description: Click the "Events" module in the sidebar
Fill "2025-01-15" into the event date field
Fill "Test Etkinliği TR" into the Turkish title field

title: Date validation: leave event date empty and verify validation error shown
description: Verifies saving an event without an event date shows a visible date validation error and the record is not saved.

steps.description: Click the "Events" module in the sidebar
Fill "Başlıksız Tarih Testi" into the Turkish title field

title: Date validation: enter invalid date format and verify validation error shown
description: Verifies saving an event with an invalid date format shows a visible date validation error.

steps.description: Click the "Events" module in the sidebar
Fill "15/01/2025" into the event date field

title: Attempt to save with missing required Turkish title and verify visible error
description: Verifies the form prevents saving (or shows an error) when the required Turkish title is missing.

steps.description: Click the "Events" module in the sidebar
Fill "2025-02-10" into the event date field

title: Create a new venue with multilingual titles, level, and capacities
description: Verifies an admin can create a new venue and see it listed in the venues table.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar
Verify text "Yeni Mekan Ekle" is visible

title: Save newly created venue and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies the venue create form can be saved successfully and the new row appears in the table.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar
Type "Test Mekan TR" into the "Mekan Adı (TR)" field

title: Verify venues table renders expected columns
description: Verifies the venues table is visible and shows the expected column headers.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar

title: Validation error when level is missing on create
description: Verifies the create venue form blocks saving and shows an error when the required level field is empty.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar

title: Edit an existing venue and add a feature (TR)
description: Verifies an admin can edit a venue and add a new feature item, then save changes.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar
Click the "Düzenle" action for the first venue in the table
Type "Yeni özellik" into the newly added "features_tr" feature input

title: Edit an existing venue and remove a feature (EN) then save
description: Verifies an admin can remove an existing feature item and persist the change after saving.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar
Click the "Düzenle" action for the first venue in the table
Click the "Sil" button next to the first item under "features_en"

title: Update multilingual features fields (TR/EN/EL) and verify saved view
description: Verifies updating feature lists across languages and confirming the UI returns to the table view after saving.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar
Click the "Düzenle" action for the first venue in the table
Type "Νέο χαρακτηριστικό" into the newly added "features_el" feature input

title: Cancel out of create venue form without saving
description: Verifies the user can exit the create form without creating a venue and returns to the table view.

steps.description: Click the "Venue" tab in the admin sidebar

title: Create a new history timeline entry and verify it appears in the table ordered by Sıra (order_index)
description: Verifies an admin can create a history entry and it appears in the history table positioned according to its order_index.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar
Fill "Test Tarihçe Kaydı TR" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field
Fill "Açıklama test" into the description field
Verify text "1999" is visible in the history table
Verify text "Test Tarihçe Kaydı TR" is visible in the history table

title: History table loads with expected columns and is ordered by Sıra (order_index)
description: Verifies the history module shows the table with expected headers and indicates ordering by order_index.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar

title: Validation: prevent saving when Year is missing
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error and does not create a record when the required Year field is empty.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar
Fill "Yıl alanı boş" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field

title: Validation: prevent saving when Başlık (TR) is missing
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error and does not create a record when the required Turkish title field is empty.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar

title: Create entry with description left empty (optional)
description: Verifies an admin can save a history entry without a description and it still appears in the table.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar
Fill "Açıklamasız Kayıt TR" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field
Verify text "1980" is visible in the history table
Verify text "Açıklamasız Kayıt TR" is visible in the history table

title: Delete a history row and confirm it is removed
description: Verifies an admin can delete a history entry and the row disappears from the table after confirmation.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar
Fill "Silinecek Kayıt TR" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field
Verify text "Silinecek Kayıt TR" is visible in the history table
Click the delete action for the row containing "Silinecek Kayıt TR"
Verify text "Silinecek Kayıt TR" is not visible

title: Cancel deletion keeps the history row visible
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation does not remove the row.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar
Fill "Silme İptal Testi TR" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field
Verify text "Silme İptal Testi TR" is visible in the history table
Click the delete action for the row containing "Silme İptal Testi TR"
Verify text "Silme İptal Testi TR" is visible in the history table

title: Ordering: create two entries with different Sıra values and verify the lower Sıra appears earlier
description: Verifies the table ordering behavior by adding two items and checking the expected order by their Sıra values.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the admin username/email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the admin password field
Click the "History" tab in the admin sidebar
Fill "Sıra Test A" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field
Fill "Sıra Test B" into the "Başlık (TR)" title field
Verify text "Sıra Test A" is visible in the history table
Verify text "Sıra Test B" is visible in the history table

title: Create a new main category and see it listed in Ana Kategoriler
description: Verifies an admin can create a main category and it appears in the main categories table.

steps.description: Verify text "Categories" is visible in the admin sidebar

title: Save a newly created main category with required fields
description: Verifies the new category form accepts values for type_key, labels, tab, and archive type and saves successfully.

steps.description: Type "Test Kategori TR" into the "label_tr" field

title: Verify the created main category is visible in the Ana Kategoriler table after saving
description: Verifies the category appears in the main categories list after clicking Kaydet.

title: Open Alt Kategoriler tab and start creating a new subcategory
description: Verifies the admin can switch to the subcategories tab and open the new subcategory form.

title: Create a new subcategory under a selected parent category and see it listed
description: Verifies a subcategory can be created with key_name, labels, and parent_category_id and then appears in the subcategories table.

title: Main categories and subcategories tables are both accessible from Categories module
description: Verifies the Categories module loads and both tables can be viewed via tab switching.

steps.description: Verify element "Ana Kategoriler table" is visible
Verify element "Alt Kategoriler table" is visible

title: Cancel/close new category creation without saving does not add a row
description: Verifies exiting the new category form without saving does not show the entered label in the main categories table.

steps.description: Type "DoNotSave Kategori TR" into the "label_tr" field
Verify text "DoNotSave Kategori TR" is not visible

title: View Page Content list columns and entries
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open the Page Content module and see the list with expected columns and rows.

title: Edit a content row and save updated multilingual content
description: Verifies an admin can edit a page_content row, update content_tr/content_en/content_el, save, and see the updated text in the list.

steps.description: Click the "Edit/Düzenle" action for the first visible content row
Fill "Updated TR content - e2e" into the content_tr field

title: Save after editing EN and EL content fields
description: Verifies that editing English and Greek content fields can be saved and the UI shows the updated values afterward.

steps.description: Click the "Edit/Düzenle" action for the first visible content row
Fill "Updated EN content - e2e" into the content_en field
Fill "Updated EL content - e2e" into the content_el field

title: Warning when changing page_key or section_key on a published record
description: Verifies that changing mapping keys on a published page_content record triggers a warning about breaking frontend mappings.

steps.description: Click the "Edit/Düzenle" action for a visible published content entry

title: Explicit confirmation required after key change warning
description: Verifies the UI requires explicit confirmation before saving key changes that can break frontend mappings.

steps.description: Click the "Edit/Düzenle" action for a visible published content entry

title: Delete a page content entry with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete a page_content entry, confirm the deletion, and the entry is removed from the list.

steps.description: Click the "Delete/Sil" action for the first visible content row

title: Deletion warning about potential frontend breakage is shown
description: Verifies that initiating deletion shows a warning indicating deletion may break frontend mappings/content.

steps.description: Click the "Delete/Sil" action for a visible content entry

title: Cancel out of delete confirmation keeps item in the list
description: Verifies that canceling the delete confirmation does not remove the content entry from the list.

steps.description: Click the "Delete/Sil" action for the first visible content row

title: View Test Planları list and verify core columns and New Plan action
description: Ensures the Test Plans module is accessible from the admin panel and the list view renders expected columns and actions.

steps.description: Click on the "test_plans" tab in the sidebar
Verify text "+ Yeni Plan" is visible

title: Create a new test plan with required fields and confirm it appears in the list
description: Creates a new plan via + Yeni Plan and verifies it is listed after saving.

steps.description: Click on the "test_plans" tab in the sidebar
Type "E2E Plan - TestSprite" into the "Plan Adı" field
Type "Admin içi QA planı" into the "Açıklama" field
Verify text "E2E Plan - TestSprite" is visible

title: Create a new plan using an optional template selection
description: Verifies the optional template chooser can be used during plan creation and the plan is saved successfully.

steps.description: Click on the "test_plans" tab in the sidebar
Type "Şablonlu Plan" into the "Plan Adı" field
Select the first available option from the template dropdown

title: Plan creation validation: missing Plan Adı shows an error
description: Verifies required field validation triggers when Plan Adı is empty and saving is blocked.

steps.description: Click on the "test_plans" tab in the sidebar
